  • Uses of ReceiptResponse in com.example.restapi.service

    Methods in com.example.restapi.service that return ReceiptResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReceiptResponse
    ReceiptService.cancelOrder(Long receiptId)
    Cancels an order that is still in PROCESSING state.
    ReceiptResponse
    CartService.checkout(UUID ownerId, PaymentRequest paymentRequest)
    Finalises the purchase (checkout).
    ReceiptResponse
    ReceiptService.getReceiptById(Long receiptId)
    Retrieves a single receipt by id, refreshing its order status first.
    Methods in com.example.restapi.service that return types with arguments of type ReceiptResponse
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ReceiptResponse>
    ReceiptService.getReceiptsByBuyerId(UUID buyerId)
    Returns every receipt belonging to a buyer, refreshing order status first.
